recommendations.title: Some Kind of Beautiful

recommendations.title: Goodbye Mr. Loser
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged loser travels back in time to his high school years to put his life on the right track.

recommendations.title: Pappa ante Portas
recommendations.overview: Heinrich Lohse, a strict and highly efficient purchasing manager at a company bulk-orders 40 tons of mustard and enough typewriting paper for 40 years just to get discount. Heinrich's boss decides it’s time for him to retire early. Heinrich suddenly

recommendations.title: The Curse of the Jade Scorpion
recommendations.overview: CW Briggs is a veteran insurance investigator, with many successes. Betty Ann Fitzgerald is a new employee in the company he works for, with the task of reorganizing the office. They don't like each other - or at least that's what they think. During

recommendations.title: The Neighbors' Window
recommendations.overview: The story of a middle-aged woman with small children whose life is shaken up when two free-spirited twenty-somethings move in across the street.

recommendations.title: Try Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Teenager Jones has opted not to go to college and is instead renting a room in a boarding house to work on his writing skills. Soon, Jones finds himself dividing his time between two women: a young actress named Lisa and a photographer named Jane. Af

recommendations.title: The Blue Caftan
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged tailor and his wife find their relationship challenged by the arrival of a handsome new apprentice.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Overboard
recommendations.overview: A spoiled, wealthy yacht owner is thrown overboard and becomes the target of revenge from his mistreated employee.

recommendations.title: Last Christmas
recommendations.overview: Kate is a young woman who has a habit of making bad decisions, and her last date with disaster occurs after she accepts work as Santa's elf for a department store. However, after she meets Tom there, her life takes a new turn.
